positive: A stylized, vibrant illustration of a mystical constellation map intertwined with bioluminescent tropical flora. The main subject is a central, geometrically perfect representation of the Great Bear constellation, rendered with sharp, glowing lines of deep teal and electric sapphire. The flora includes stylized monstera leaves and delicate ferns, glowing with soft lime green and coral accents. Composition is central, symmetrical, and highly detailed, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Lighting is dramatic and ethereal, utilizing strong glowing highlights against a deep midnight blue background. High contrast, flat graphic vector style mixed with photorealistic glowing elements. Minimalist, yet rich. Perfect for apparel, clean silhouette.
negative: blurry, artifacts, grain, noise, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, low detail, realistic photo, 3d render, messy, clutter, negative space
